summary: Frontend-only testing of FinanceSaathi app. All core features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Sale form submit with empty amount - no visible error message shown (form may be using browser native validation or silent validation). Could not confirm error display.

issues: Summary strip cards are cut off horizontally on mobile (scroll needed to see all 4) - this appears intentional with horizontal scroll
Date inputs use browser default date picker (native <input type=date>) instead of custom component - minor UX concern

action_items: Verify Sale form shows visible validation error when amount is 0 or empty on submit
critical_code_review_comments: Date inputs use native browser date picker - consider using shadcn Calendar component for consistent UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 transaction type cards navigate correctly. All pages load (pending, parties, receivables, payables, trial-balance, profit-loss). Mobile bottom nav shows 5 tabs. Sidebar shows all 8 sections. API errors gracefully shown as 'Unavailable' or 'Could not load'. Backend not running - expected.
passed_tests: App loads at root URL with sidebar and dashboard
Home page shows greeting, summary strip (4 cards), receivables+payables, recent activity, quick record shortcuts
Record page shows all 6 transaction type cards
I Sold Something -> /record/sale with customer/cash toggle, amount, date, note, received-in toggle
/parties loads with filter tabs and search
/profit-loss loads with date filters and Load button
Mobile bottom nav shows 5 tabs (Home, Pending, Record, People, Reports)
